studies.title: Effects of a digital health application on mental health while waiting for an outpatient psychotherapy appointment

_verification.reason: The study specifically mentions the use of the digital health application 'elona explore' in the intervention group, which matches the product name provided.

_classification.reason: The study involves random allocation of participants to either an intervention group that receives immediate access to a digital health application or a control group that receives access after ten weeks, which is characteristic of a randomized controlled trial.
